name: tado-cowork-plugin
description: Tado bridge for Claude Cowork — exposes Tado's full 71-tool surface (16 tado_*, 18 dome_*, 41 tado_use_*) as MCP servers, plus a teaching skill that orients Cowork inside Tado's mental model and an agent persona for canvas-coworker collaboration with Claude Code / Codex tiles.
author: Tado

vaultPath.description: Path to your Tado Dome vault. Defaults to ~/Library/Application Support/Tado/dome/. Override only if you've moved Tado's storage root.

domeToken.description: Agent token for the Dome MCP server. Tado mints one automatically when the bundled installer runs (Settings → Engine → Bootstrap Cowork plugin); copy it from there if prompted.
